title: WAF Web Shell Upload Attempt Blocked
description: Detects attempts to upload web shell files blocked by WAF. Web shells provide persistent remote access through the web server. OWASP A03:2021 Injection.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'BLOCK' and 'HTTP Method' = 'POST') and (('Request URL' like '*.php*' or 'Request URL' like '*.jsp*' or 'Request URL' like '*.asp*' or 'Request URL' like '*.aspx*' or 'Request URL' like '*.cgi*' or 'Request URL' like '*upload*' or 'Request URL' like '*file*')) and (('Request Body' like '*<?php*' or 'Request Body' like '*system(*' or 'Request Body' like '*exec(*' or 'Request Body' like '*passthru(*' or 'Request Body' like '*shell_exec(*' or 'Request Body' like '*eval(*' or 'Request Body' like '*base64_decode(*' or 'Request Body' like '*<%@ page*' or 'Request Body' like '*Runtime.getRuntime*' or 'Request Body' like '*ProcessBuilder*' or 'Request Body' like '*cmd.exe*' or 'Request Body' like '*/bin/sh*' or 'Request Body' like '*c99shell*' or 'Request Body' like '*r57shell*')))
